Senior Backend Engineer — Platform Team

We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to build and operate APIs that power our customer-facing platform. You will work with a collaborative team shipping reliable services on AWS.

Requirements:
- Strong Python and experience with FastAPI or similar frameworks
- Solid SQL skills (PostgreSQL preferred) and performance tuning
- Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD
- Familiarity with Kafka or similar streaming systems

Nice to have:
- Terraform or other IaC
- OpenTelemetry / observability tooling

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement REST and event-driven integrations
- Improve reliability, monitoring, and on-call readiness
- Mentor engineers and participate in architecture reviews
